what happened in work order number 8520-:
Work order 8520-00 involved percolation testing for the conversion of existing cesspools to new individual wastewater systems (IWS) at the Enterprise Rent-A-Car facility in Hilo, Hawaii (W.O. 8520-00). 

Here are the key details:

* **Project Site:** Enterprise Rent-A-Car facility (TMK:  2-1-12: 096 and 098) near Hilo International Airport (W.O. 8520-00).
* **Project Goal:** Convert existing cesspools to new IWS with a septic tank and leach field (W.O. 8520-00).
* **Percolation Testing:** Two percolation tests were performed at the proposed leach field locations (P-1 and P-2) (W.O. 8520-00).
* **Percolation Rates:**  The percolation rates were determined to be about 1.7 and 10.7 minutes per inch for P-1 and P-2, respectively (W.O. 8520-00).
* **Conclusion:** The "Manual of Septic-Tank Practice" deemed the leach field locations suitable for siting of the absorption system (W.O. 8520-00).
